strengths: The agent successfully resolved the customer's issues, demonstrating effective problem-solving skills.
The agent's communication was professional, empathetic, and clear throughout the conversation, creating a positive customer experience.
The agent achieved 100% policy compliance, adhering to all relevant banking policies and procedures.
improvements: Consider asking clarifying questions to ensure a thorough understanding of the customer's needs and concerns.

To further enhance the customer experience, consider proactively offering solutions or alternatives when possible.
